title: podman-login: adhere to user input
body:
* Do not try to login with existing credentials when the user specifies a
  username or password on the CLI.

* Improve error messages.

* Use specified tls-verify switch and cert-dir for all requests.

Fixes: #2092
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: @mheon the shmlock tests seem to cause issues (also in current master). Can you have a look?

Yes I have seen some hangs.
LGTM

@vrothberg It's a bad flake - I'm hoping that #2083 will fix it.

Worst case, I'll just remove the test, I don't think the one that's failing is really testing anything sane at the moment.

Are there binary builds from pull requests?
No, there are no binary builds. If you want to test it, you need to build it locally as [described in the docs](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/install.md).
There is a COPR that builds our latest master - @baude maintains it
